title: clematis × cartmanii
intro: Clematis × cartmanii, also known as Clematis cartmanii or Evergreen Clematis, is a hybrid flowering plant that is a cross between Clematis alpina and Clematis montana. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clematis × cartmanii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
